title: Mineral Wool Calculator
shortDescription: Calculate how many rolls or packs of mineral wool you need for attic, wall, or ceiling insulation.
metaTitle: Mineral Wool Calculator | Estimate Packs and Volume
metaDescription: Calculate mineral wool volume, coverage with waste, and how many packs or rolls you need for attic, wall, or ceiling insulation.
intro: Use this mineral wool calculator to estimate the amount of insulation needed for an attic, wall, or ceiling. Enter the area, insulation thickness, pack coverage, waste percentage, and pack volume to get a quick material estimate.
overview: This tool helps you plan mineral wool insulation by converting surface area and thickness into the required insulation volume, then estimating the number of packs or rolls based on the coverage per package. It is useful for attic, wall, and ceiling projects where accurate material planning reduces waste and avoids shortages.
howItWorks: Enter the insulation area in square meters.
Add the required insulation thickness in centimeters.
Specify how much area one pack covers.
Provide the volume of one pack to calculate the total needed volume and package count.
useCases: Estimating mineral wool for attic insulation.
Calculating packs for ceiling or roof slope insulation.
Checking how much extra material to buy for cutting waste.
Comparing package coverage before ordering insulation.

examples.title: Example
examples.input: Area: 100 m², Thickness: 20 cm, Coverage per pack: 6 m², Waste: 10%, Pack volume: 1.2 m³
examples.output: Shows total insulation volume, area with waste, and number of packs needed.
examples.description: Helpful for estimating material before buying mineral wool.

examples.title: Example
examples.input: Area: 45 m², Thickness: 15 cm, Coverage per pack: 4.5 m², Waste: 8%, Pack volume: 0.9 m³
examples.output: Returns the required volume and pack count for a small insulation job.
examples.description: Useful for wall or ceiling insulation planning.

faq.question: How do I calculate mineral wool needed?
faq.answer: Multiply the insulated area by the thickness converted to meters to get the insulation volume. Then divide by the volume per pack and add waste if needed.

faq.question: Does this calculator work for attic insulation?
faq.answer: Yes. It is suitable for attic, wall, and ceiling insulation projects.

faq.question: Why should I add waste percentage?
faq.answer: Waste covers cutting, fitting, and small overlaps, helping you avoid running short during installation.

faq.question: Can I use it for rolls and packs?
faq.answer: Yes. The result shows the number of rolls or packs needed based on the package volume and coverage.

seo.title: Mineral Wool Calculator
seo.description: Estimate how much mineral wool you need for attic, wall, or ceiling insulation and calculate the number of packs or rolls.
